Class PrepareStatementList

java.lang.Object
recoder.kit.Transformation
recoder.kit.TwoPassTransformation
recoder.kit.transformation.PrepareStatementList
public class PrepareStatementList extends TwoPassTransformation
Syntactic transformation returning a mutable statement list that contains the given statement, and creating a new StatementBlock if necessary. It is necessary to create a new block, if StatementKit.getStatementMutableList(Statement)returns null . This is the case if the statement container allows only a single statement and the given statement is not inside a StatementBlock. If the statement has no parent, it is wrapped into a new statement list.
Added:
a new statement block, containing a cloned version of a statement if this is necessary and the transformation is visible. The original or cloned statement is returned by the getStatement()method.
Removed:
the original statement wrapped by a block, in case this is necessary.
See Also:
  • StatementKit.getStatementMutableList(Statement)

  • Constructor Details

    • PrepareStatementList

      public PrepareStatementList(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration sc, Statement s, boolean isVisible)
      Creates a new transformation object that wraps a statement with a new statement block if necessary.
      Parameters:
      sc - the service configuration to use.
      s - a statement to be wrapped by a new statement block.

  • Method Details

    • isVisible

      public boolean isVisible()
      Description copied from class: Transformation
      Checks if this transformation is meant to be visible and shall report changes to the model. If a transformation is not visible, it may not change parts of the current model. This default implementation returns true.
      Overrides:
      isVisible in class Transformation
      Returns:
      true.

    • analyze

      public ProblemReport analyze()
      Returns a new PrepareStatementList.IllegalParentContext if the statement is not embedded in a statement container, otherwise Transformation.NO_PROBLEMif the statement is a local variable declaration (which might potentially change program semantics), otherwise Transformation.EQUIVALENCE.
      Overrides:
      analyze in class TwoPassTransformation
      Returns:
      the problem report.

    • transform

      public void transform()
      Clones the statement and replaces it with a new statement block containing the cloned tree.
      Overrides:
      transform in class TwoPassTransformation
      See Also:
      • analyze()

    • getBlock

      public StatementBlock getBlock()
      Returns the new statement block after the transformation, if there had one to be inserted. The block will contain the statement or a clone of the statement as sole child node.
      Returns:
      the new statement block replacing the given statement, or null if there a new block was not necessary.
      See Also:
      • getStatement()

    • getStatementList

      public ASTList<Statement> getStatementList()
      Returns:
      the statement mutable list containing the given statement.

    • getStatement

      public Statement getStatement()
      Returns the statement that has been wrapped. If this is a visible transformation and the statement had to be wrapped, a clone of the initial argument is returned.
      Returns:
      the statement that has been wrapped, possibly a clone of the original statement.
